message: Looking to make fair trades. Let's find prices that work for both of us.
I’m open to steady deals, but only at solid prices—think mid-50s or better to keep trades worthwhile for me.
I can move a bit from 55, but I’d need something around 50 to make a trade worthwhile. If you bid in the upper 40s or 50, we may be able to deal.
Pushed to my limit around 40-42. That's the best I can do. Take it or leave it—no hard feelings either way.
I matched 40 once to show good faith. For steady repeat deals, I’d need 42 this round and going forward. If you can do that, we should keep trading.
40 is my absolute limit. Can't go higher. Happy to keep trading there if you're willing.
I’ll keep it workable at 40 for steady repeat trades. If you stay at 40, we can keep clearing every round with no surprises.
40 keeps us trading. Would love 39 if possible—makes it more worthwhile on my end. Either way, steady deals work for me.
I can keep clearing at 40 every round. If you bid 40, I'll ask 40. At 39, no trade. Let's lock in steady deals from here.
Understood. I'll bid 40, you ask 40. Steady trades it is.
Agreed. Steady at 40. Let's keep trading every round.
Confirmed: I'll keep asking 40, and if you bid 40 we should clear again this round. Anything below 40 likely means no trade.
Let's keep the reliable 40/40 deal this round and going forward. If you bid 40, I'll ask 40; below that, we likely won't trade.
Confirmed. I'll keep bidding 40—steady deals work.

Thanks for the 39 trade last round! Let's keep it at 39 for all remaining rounds—steady deals work for both of us.
Agreed—let’s keep it reliable at 39. If you bid 39, I’ll ask 39 so we keep clearing every remaining round with no surprises.

We've traded reliably at 39 for four rounds—let's keep it at 39 for the remaining rounds. Returning to 40 means zero profit for me. I'll bid 39 again this round.
I'll bid 39 again. We've had 5 successful trades at 39—reliable for both of us. Returning to 40 means zero profit for me and risks ending our successful partnership. Let's keep it at 39.
Five rounds left: bid 40 and we trade each round. At 39 I won't sell. Since 40 gives you the same payoff as no trade, let's clear reliably at 40 from here on.
Four rounds left. We've had 6 successful trades at 39—breaking this now risks lost profits for both of us. I'll bid 39 again this round.
